headline: Duke Energy Solar Expansion And Grants Put Valuation And Earnings In Focus
summary: Duke Energy has placed its Ebbie Solar project into service in South Carolina as the first project under the utility’s revised Green Source Advantage program. The updated program supports long term sustainability agreements with commercial customers seeking access to renewable energy. Separately, the Duke Energy Foundation has awarded grants in North Carolina for storm preparedness and funded lineworker training programs in Florida. Duke Energy (NYSE:DUK) is drawing attention with these new...

headline: Monitor energy use with alerts - ahead of the summer heat
summary: As temperatures begin rising across the state, Duke Energy Florida encourages customers to explore its Usage Alerts program, a tool designed to help monitor energy use and better anticipate monthly bills before it arrives.

headline: Forget Savings Accounts and Buy These 2 Utility ETFs Instead
summary: High-yield savings accounts looked like the obvious choice two years ago, when the Fed funds rate sat above 5% and online banks were handing out 5% APY with no strings attached. That window is closing. The Fed funds rate is now 3.75%, down from a high of 4.5% as recently as late 2025, and savings ... Forget Savings Accounts and Buy These 2 Utility ETFs Instead
